visual_description: A wooden door features red lettering on its surface. A woman in a blue top holds a child with blonde hair, her mouth open and eyes wide as she looks toward the right. A man in a maroon jacket stands in a hallway, gripping an axe and repeatedly swinging it at the door.
audio_description: The audio includes the heavy thud of the axe striking the door and a brief gasp from the woman.
